---
name: Suggest content / fill a hole
about: Add something the site is missing — photos, history, hours, a guild, the donate flow…
title: "[content] "
labels: ["content", "good first issue"]
---

**Which hole or section?**
<!-- e.g. History timeline, Support/donate flow, the sewing guild, visiting hours -->

**What should it say (or show)?**
<!-- Draft text, a link to the wiki, a photo, a number — whatever you've got. Rough is fine. -->

**Anything to check or confirm?**
<!-- Facts that need a second pair of eyes, links that might be stale, etc. -->

---
*Be excellent to each other. Don't have time to write it up? A one-line pointer still helps.*
